mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, email, username, password_hash, email_verified_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_credentials WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, email, username, password_hash, email_verified_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_credentials WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, email, username, password_hash, email_verified_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_credentials WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT r.id, r.code, r.name FROM user_roles ur INNER JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.code, p.name FROM user_roles ur INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN permissions p ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id ASC
SELECT COALESCE(account_status, 'ACTIVE') FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM users WHERE user_code = #{userCode} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, code, name FROM roles WHERE code = #{roleCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_code, name, tagline, college, grade_year, bio, avatar_url, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userCode}, #{name}, #{tagline}, #{college}, #{gradeYear}, #{bio}, #{avatarUrl}, #{createdAt} )

INSERT INTO user_credentials ( user_id, email, username, password_hash, email_verified_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{email}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{emailVerifiedAt}, #{lastLoginAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
INSERT INTO user_badges (user_id, badge_name, sort_order) VALUES (#{userId}, #{badgeName}, #{sortOrder})
INSERT INTO user_profile_stats (user_id, stat_label, stat_value, sort_order) VALUES (#{userId}, #{statLabel}, #{statValue}, #{sortOrder})
INSERT IGNORE INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id, created_at, created_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy})
